content: SARAH JOHNSON - Full Stack Developer EXPERIENCE: - 4 years full-stack development experience - Frontend: React, Vue.js, JavaScript, TypeScript - Backend: Node.js, Python (Django), PostgreSQL - Some machine learning exposure with scikit-learn - Built e-commerce platforms handling 10k+ users - Experience with microservices architecture EDUCATION: - B.S. Software Engineering, Stanford (2019) - AWS Solutions Architect Certified PROJECTS: - Developed real-time chat application with WebSockets - Created inventory management system for retail chain - Built data visualization dashboard using D3.js and Python SKILLS: React, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, AWS, DevOps
